title: Confidence-tiered position sizing
objective: paper_exec.py currently opens every position at a fixed $50 regardless of the signal's confidence score. The confidence value is already stored in the DB and available in the Signal object — we just never use it for sizing. This task adds confidence-tiered sizing: low confidence stays at base ($50), medium-high confidence scales up to 1.25x ($62.50), high confidence scales up to 1.50x ($75.00), with a hard cap at $100.

deliverables.label: Add confidence sizing env vars to .env
deliverables.where: Bottom of .env file — after existing PAPER_POSITION_SIZE_USD line
deliverables.change:
Add:
# Confidence-based position sizing
CONF_SIZING_ENABLED=true
CONF_TIER_HIGH=0.70
CONF_TIER_VHIGH=0.80
CONF_SIZE_MID_MULT=1.25
CONF_SIZE_HIGH_MULT=1.50
MAX_POSITION_SIZE_USD=100

deliverables.label: Add _confidence_size() helper and tiered sizing in open_position()
deliverables.where: Module level (after PAPER_POSITION_SIZE_USD line) + open_position() function (~line 38-50)
deliverables.change:
At module level, after the PAPER_POSITION_SIZE_USD line, add:

CONF_SIZING_ENABLED  = os.getenv('CONF_SIZING_ENABLED', 'true').lower() == 'true'
CONF_TIER_HIGH       = float(os.getenv('CONF_TIER_HIGH', '0.70'))
CONF_TIER_VHIGH      = float(os.getenv('CONF_TIER_VHIGH', '0.80'))
CONF_SIZE_MID_MULT   = float(os.getenv('CONF_SIZE_MID_MULT', '1.25'))
CONF_SIZE_HIGH_MULT  = float(os.getenv('CONF_SIZE_HIGH_MULT', '1.50'))
MAX_POSITION_SIZE_USD = float(os.getenv('MAX_POSITION_SIZE_USD', '100.0'))

def _confidence_size(base_usd: float, confidence: float) -> float:
    if not CONF_SIZING_ENABLED:
        return base_usd
    if confidence >= CONF_TIER_VHIGH:
        mult = CONF_SIZE_HIGH_MULT
    elif confidence >= CONF_TIER_HIGH:
        mult = CONF_SIZE_MID_MULT
    else:
        mult = 1.0
    return min(base_usd * mult, MAX_POSITION_SIZE_USD)

In open_position(), replace:
  qty = PAPER_POSITION_SIZE_USD / fill_px
With:
  size_usd = _confidence_size(PAPER_POSITION_SIZE_USD, signal.confidence)
  qty = size_usd / fill_px

acceptance_criteria: CONF_SIZING_ENABLED=true in .env (can be toggled to false to revert to flat $50)
Signal with confidence=0.72 (>= CONF_TIER_HIGH, < CONF_TIER_VHIGH) → size_usd = $62.50
MAX_POSITION_SIZE_USD=100 hard cap respected — no position can exceed $100
CONF_SIZING_ENABLED=false → all positions use base $50 regardless of confidence
No other files modified beyond core/paper_exec.py and .env
verification: Read core/paper_exec.py and confirm _confidence_size() function is present
Read core/paper_exec.py and confirm open_position() calls _confidence_size()
Read .env and confirm all 6 CONF_ vars are present
Trace: confidence=0.72, base=50 → mult=1.25 → size=62.5 → qty=62.5/fill_px ✓
rollback: Set CONF_SIZING_ENABLED=false in .env (no code revert needed). Or revert core/paper_exec.py and .env.
